---
title: "George Dundas, Lord Manour"
---

## George Dundas, Lord Manour

**Dates:** (1802-1869)

### Description

Scots judge, brother-in-law of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

A Scots judge, he was styled Lord Manour from 1868; he married Elizabeth Mackenzie (d.1858) and had four daughters and five sons; he was brother-in-law of Anne Mackenzie and father of Mary Dundas.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
